Cheers,

variations.compliment: Persona looks like a really impressive company - running both the FedRAMP 20x pilot and the traditional Rev5 pathway at the same time is an unusual choice, and being the only identity verification provider to reach FedRAMP 20x Moderate Authorization really stands out!

variations.compliment: Persona looks like a great company - the Persona Wallet is such a smart idea, letting people securely save their verified info and reuse it to speed up future verification flows on any business that uses Persona.
